title: Phase V Provenance Dossier: phase5-su2-branch-refinement-env-validation

studies.description: Phase V campaign phase5-su2-branch-refinement-env-validation — positive evidence dossier

provenance.notes: Phase X standard evidence campaign: branch study still uses the admitted multi-variant atlas on the same strict thresholds, refinement now points to a direct solver-backed ladder, bridge-derived convergence remains available separately for comparison, the imported benchmark remains repo-internal, and candidate-specific escalation still fails closed when candidate-linked branch/background provenance is absent.

evidenceVerdict: All 2 studies regenerated from current code. Overall tier: regenerated-cpu. Acceptable as Phase V validation evidence.
